Reporting tips

Start with Show only missing filter to focus on incomplete entries. Indicators shown are configured by your M&E Administrator in the M&E Builder. Use bulk remarks for similar indicators. Submit only when all validation flags are resolved.

! Framework has unpublished changes. Reporting still uses the last published version.

Program Goals
Measurable goals specific to this program — these sit at the top of the M&E hierarchy above outcomes and activities.
Interventions
Create each intervention — set its Environment and Child Experience (fixed per intervention), assign stakeholder types. Then expand each stakeholder to define their Outcomes and Activities, and connect activities to the outcomes they contribute to.
No interventions yet. Click + New intervention to start building your LFA.

Upload Flow
Use top filters (Program, Financial Year, Frequency, Period), then select Intervention, Activity Type, Activity and Stakeholder Type before upload.
Program/FY/Frequency/Period will appear here.
Activity profile
Activity Response Matrix
Complete all filters to enable file upload.
Drop your response file here
Workshop attendance, training feedback, observation visit data — any Google Sheet export or Excel / CSV file from your monthly activities
Must contain a UDISE code column · Multiple files allowed per month
workshop_feb2026.xlsx

— matched — need mapping

File Program Month Rows Schools matched Unmatched Participants Uploaded Status
No uploads yet · upload a file to see history here
Program-wise activity response templates
Create multiple templates per program (workshop, training, review meeting). Template geography and stakeholder mapping define the UDISE universe used during bulk upload.
Create activity response template
Map stakeholder to geography level. Example: DIET at district level includes all UDISE schools in that district.
Select intervention to view type and categories.
Select one or many stakeholder types for this activity template. Counts are shown from Geography Mapping coverage for quick verification.
Response Columns (Google Sheet style)
Column Name Type Required Mapping Role
Geography Scope (dropdown from mapping)
State
District
Block
Cluster
School / UDISE
Dropdown options come from Geography Mapping. Choose a level value or keep “All mapped”.
Activity Matrix (drives upload KPIs)
Matrix Metric Source Column Aggregation Output Key
Templates for selected program No program selected
Template Reporting Cycle Activity Stakeholders Activity Matrix Status Action
Select a program card to start creating templates
UDISE master data — per-program school universe
Each program operates within a specific state's school universe. Upload the state UDISE master file once (one-time admin setup). The system uses this to match UDISE codes from monthly response files and look up student/teacher counts for impact KPI calculation.
Upload UDISE master file
Select program, then upload the state UDISE Excel file. Required columns: UDISE Code, School Name, District, Block, Total Students, Total Teachers. The Odisha file you provided (44,750 schools) is the exact format expected.
No file chosen
Program geography mapping (one-time setup)
Configure stakeholder-to-geography mapping once for each program. You can keep default stakeholder types or add custom stakeholders with custom geography scopes.
Custom program names are supported. Define reach scope below.
Stakeholder geography mapping
These mappings are reused by activity templates and bulk upload processing for the selected program.
Program Coverage Blueprint
Define overall program scope first. Stakeholder mapping can only use this coverage.
Program Scope Type
This controls whether a level is single/multiple and which lower levels stay auto-all.
States (Name/Code)
Use combobox to add one or many states for this program.
Districts (Name/Code)
Uncheck "all" to select specific districts.
Blocks (Name/Code)
Uncheck "all" to select specific blocks.
Clusters (Name/Code)
Optional: keep clusters skipped when not used in program design.
Schools (Name/UDISE)
When cluster is skipped, schools are derived directly from selected blocks.
Level Mode Scope Summary
Select a program card to define coverage
Stakeholder Mapping Within Coverage
Stakeholder Type Hierarchy Tag Geography Level Geography Scope (comma-separated) Active Action
Select a program card to start geography mapping
